results.question: List the enforcement types and the number of matters associated with each, for fiscal year 2010.
results.expected_answer:
Consent Order Accepted for Comment | 23
Part III Administrative Complaint | 3
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?enforcementTypeLabel (COUNT(?matter) AS ?matterCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees> WHERE {
  ?matter <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/type/Matter> .
  ?matter <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/matter_has_enforcement_type> ?enforcementType .
  ?enforcementType <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/type/EnforcementType> .
  ?enforcementType <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/enforcement_type_label> ?enforcementTypeLabel .
  ?matter <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/matter_fy> "2010" .
} GROUP BY ?enforcementTypeLabel ORDER BY DESC(?matterCount)

per_seed.sql: SELECT "T2"."enforcement_type_label", COUNT(*) FROM "Matter" AS "T1" JOIN "EnforcementType" AS "T2" ON "T1"."matter_enforcement_type_id" = "T2"."enforcement_type_id" WHERE "T1"."matter_fy" = 2010 GROUP BY "T2"."enforcement_type_label"
all_sql_attempts: SELECT "T2"."enforcement_type_label", COUNT(*) FROM "Matter" AS "T1" JOIN "EnforcementType" AS "T2" ON "T1"."matter_enforcement_type_id" = "T2"."enforcement_type_id" WHERE "T1"."matter_fy" = 2010 GROUP BY "T2"."enforcement_type_label"

results.question: Which industries have matters in fiscal year 2015, and how many matters are in each of those industries?
results.expected_answer:
Health Care - Prescription Drugs | 9
Health Care - Medical Equipment/Devices | 3
Professional Services (Non Health Care) - Other | 3
Manufacturing - Industrial Goods | 2
Manufacturing - Consumer Goods (non Food & Bev.) | 1
Energy - Petroleum | 1
Health Care - Hospitals/Clinics | 1
Retail - Grocery/Supermarkets | 1
Manufacturing - Food & Beverages | 1
Information and Technology - Other | 1
... (11 total rows)
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?industryLabel (COUNT(?matter) AS ?matterCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees> WHERE {
  ?matter <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/type/Matter> .
  ?matter <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/matter_in_industry> ?industry .
  ?industry <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/type/Industry> .
  ?industry <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/industry_label> ?industryLabel .
  ?matter <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/matter_fy> "2015" .
} GROUP BY ?industryLabel ORDER BY DESC(?matterCount)

Retail - Grocery/Supermarkets | 24 | 2004.41666666666666666667
Health Care - Retail/Pharmacies | 12 | 2003.41666666666666666667
Energy - Natural Gas | 22 | 2003.90909090909090909091
Defense - Ammunitions | 2 | 2012.5
Defense - Equipment and Engineering Services | 9 | 2000.66666666666666666667

full_expected_items: Professional Services (Non Health Care) - Real Estate | 15 | 2007.53333333333333333333
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?industryLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?matter) AS ?matterCount) (AVG(xsd:integer(?fyValue)) AS ?averageFiscalYear) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees> WHERE {
  ?industry <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/type/Industry> .
  ?industry <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/industry_label> ?industryLabel .
  ?matter <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/type/Matter> .
  ?matter <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/matter_in_industry> ?industry .
  ?matter <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/matter_in_fy> ?fiscalYear .
  ?fiscalYear <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/type/FiscalYear> .
  ?fiscalYear <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/fy_value> ?fyValue .
} GROUP BY ?industryLabel

schema:
-- SQLite database schema

-- Table Matter: 599 rows (from Matter.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Matter" (
  "matter_id" TEXT,
  "matter_number" INTEGER,
  "matter_name" TEXT,
  "matter_date" TEXT,
  "matter_fy" INTEGER,
  "matter_category_id" TEXT,
  "matter_industry_id" TEXT,
  "matter_enforcement_type_id" TEXT,
  "matter_subtype_id" TEXT,
  "matter_url" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Matter:
--   matter_id='merger_1910068', matter_number='1910068', matter_name='DTE Energy/Generation Pipeline', matter_date='9/13/2019', matter_fy='2019', matter_category_id='merger', matter_industry_id='ind_40e1e6e9cd55', matter_enforcement_type_id='etype_15d57c3be768', matter_subtype_id='', matter_url='https://www.ftc.gov/news-events/press-re'
--   matter_id='merger_1810215', matter_number='1810215', matter_name='US Foods/SGA', matter_date='9/11/2019', matter_fy='2019', matter_category_id='merger', matter_industry_id='ind_02a62e6fbca5', matter_enforcement_type_id='etype_15d57c3be768', matter_subtype_id='', matter_url='https://www.ftc.gov/news-events/press-re'

-- Table Industry: 34 rows (from Industry.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Industry" (
  "industry_id" TEXT,
  "industry_label" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Industry:
--   industry_id='ind_40e1e6e9cd55', industry_label='Energy - Natural Gas'
--   industry_id='ind_02a62e6fbca5', industry_label='Retail - Grocery/Supermarkets'

-- Table EnforcementType: 6 rows (from EnforcementType.csv)
CREATE TABLE "EnforcementType" (
  "enforcement_type_id" TEXT,
  "enforcement_type_label" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from EnforcementType:
--   enforcement_type_id='etype_15d57c3be768', enforcement_type_label='Consent Order Accepted for Comment'
--   enforcement_type_id='etype_e84d4d1eebc8', enforcement_type_label='Preliminary Injunction'

-- Table FiscalYear: 24 rows (from FiscalYear.csv)
CREATE TABLE "FiscalYear" (
